title: CE-3K

{{Quote|Very good, Master Luke. I'll have your ''tools'' ready when you awaken.|CE-3K|<ref name="DE" />}}
'''CE-3K''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], CE-3K was assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] quarters on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]], shortly before the world was [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attacked]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
===Stationed on New Alderaan===
{{Quote|We've just come from Pinnacle Base. The moon has been ''completely destroyed.'' All the leaders of the Alliance are ''dead.''<s></s>|Luke Skywalker tells CE-3K and the Solo family about the destruction of Pinnacle Base|<ref name="DE" />}}
CE-3K was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in service of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="DE" /> by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, which include the appearance of CE-3K, to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].</ref> That year, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was stationed in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[New Aldera]] on the New Republic [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]], which served as a hideout for the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]]—[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and their children [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]].<ref name="DE" />

[[File:LukeReturnsToNewAlderaan.jpg|thumb|right|250px|CE-3K bears witness to Luke Skywalker's return to New Alderaan.]]
CE-3K accompanied the Solos when they came to greet [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] upon his arrival on New Alderaan after a [[Skirmish on Ossus|trip]] to the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. The droid, alongside the Solos, was the first to hear from [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker]] that the New Republic [[Pinnacle Base]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Da Soocha V]] had been [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|destroyed]]<ref name="DE" /> by a [[particle disintegrator warhead]] fired from [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Galaxy Gun]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]].<ref name="DE 5">[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]]</ref>

===Dark Jedi incursion===
{{Quote|Thanks ''CE-3K''. I'm really exhausted from the trip. I've got a ''lot'' to think about. This ''new hand'' the Emperor gave me hasn't worked right since I left Byss…I'll have to adjust it in the morning.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="DE" />}}
Later that [[Standard day/Legends|night]], CE-3K attended to Skywalker while the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master was preparing to go to [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]] in his quarters. Tired from his journey, Skywalker also intended to have his new [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic]] right [[Limb/Legends|hand]]—given to him by Palpatine during Skywalker's brief stint as the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]]—checked in the morning, as Skywalker was unsatisfied with how it operated. CE-3K responded that it would provide Skywalker with the necessary repair tools in the morning. Taking away Skywalker's [[Clothing/Legends|robes]], the protocol droid left the Jedi's quarters.<ref name="DE" />

At night, Skywalker became the target of an abduction attempt by a pair of Palpatine's [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], [[Tedryn-Sha]] and [[Krdys Mordi]], but he was saved by Organa Solo and [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainee]] [[Jem Ysanna]]. The entire New Republic settlement then came under [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attack]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, necessitating complete evacuation.<ref name="DE" />

==Characteristics==
CE-3K was a protocol droid<ref name="CSWE" /> that was constructed to be [[humanoid]] in design. The droid had a dome-shaped cranium and [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]].<ref name="DE" />

==Behind the scenes==
CE-3K first appeared in the [[1995]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]], written by [[Tom Veitch]] and illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]].<ref name="DE" />
